title: varilla mexicana var. mexicana
intro: Varilla mexicana var. mexicana, also known as Mexican tuberose or Mexican varilla, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Varilla mexicana var. mexicana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and act as an antispasmodic to ease muscle spasms. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for various health conditions.
